libs_implemented: H0 persistence via numpy union-find over Vietoris-Rips filtration (exact single-linkage MST); persistence landscape L1/L2 norm in numpy (Bubenik); H1 is a documented PROXY (mst-gap), NOT real H1 (no gudhi/ripser).
notes: Gidea-Katz persistence on a sliding window of BES daily return vectors (embed=takens_d5, W=20, feat=total_pers). H0 persistence is EXACT (union-find / single-linkage MST); landscape L2 norm computed in numpy; H1 is a flagged PROXY (mst-gap), not real H1 (no gudhi). STANDALONE short-when-high: OOS Sharpe=-0.01, PSR=0.494, ret=-0.5%/yr -> no standalone alpha. OVERLAY on long-BTC: base Sharpe=0.10 -> gated 0.12 (Delta=+0.03, maxDD -54.9% -> -52.3%); OVERLAY on EW-long: Delta Sharpe=+0.19. IS feature-config corr(feat,fwd-ret)=-0.036. 240 variants tried; within-family DSR SR*=0.0400 vs standalone OOS SR_pp=-0.0005. H1-proxy OOS corr=+0.052. PRIOR holds: directional persistence-spike trading is overfit-prone; the honest read is whether it helps as a risk overlay. close-to-close daily maxDD is an illusion (no intrabar gap/liq).
data_caveats: Daily close-to-close USDT-perp futures; maxDD is close-to-close (no intrabar gap/liquidation -> optimistic). H1 is a proxy, not genuine 1-dim homology. Per-window z-standardization of the point cloud uses only in-window data (causal). Feature shifted >=1 bar before trading.
